title: Regeneration Request
description: FR-VID-05 §3 — Operator request for surgical beat regeneration. Sent by FR-VID-09 review UI to the regeneration handler.

beat_index.description: Index of the beat to regenerate.

mode.description: Regeneration mode: T2I_ONLY (new keyframe, cascade I2V), I2V_ONLY (same keyframe, new motion), BOTH (full).

revision_note.description: Operator's revision note describing what to change.

operator_id.description: Optional operator identifier for audit trail.
